message:
fix(codegen): fix cross-block temp scope issues in Zig codegen

- Fix get_length, get_array_el, get_array_el2 to push directly to stack
  instead of creating temps that cause cross-block scope issues
- Add _ = &CV to silence unused constant warning without pointless discard
- Change dispatch label default case to continue :dispatch to use label
- Add @ptrCast for JSContext type compatibility in frozen_init wrapper
